name: secure-cloud-landing-zone
description: Enterprise Secure AWS Cloud Landing Zone with Dashboard and Backend

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:landing" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd dashboard && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build

author: Secure Cloud Team
